speaker: seller

args.message: Welcome, welcome! Come check out this stunning 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT! Plenty of room for the whole crew, leather seats, top-notch Bose sound system – this beauty is ready for whatever life throws your way. Dealer-serviced and running like a dream, this Tahoe is the perfect partner for all your family adventures. You won't find a better deal on a full-size SUV like this anywhere!

text: Welcome, welcome! Come check out this stunning 2016 Chevrolet Tahoe LT! args.message: Sounds like a great vehicle. Has it been in any accidents?

text: Sounds like a great vehicle. Has it been in any accidents?

speaker: seller

args.message: This Tahoe? Accidents? Absolutely not! She's been a gem, meticulously maintained by the dealership. Clean as a whistle, just waiting for her next adventure with a lucky family. You can tell she's been well cared for, right?

text: This Tahoe? Accidents? Absolutely not! She's been a gem, meticulously maintained by the dealership. Clean as a whistle, just waiting for her next adventure with a lucky family. You can tell she's been well cared for, right?

speaker: buyer

args.message: That's good to hear. I'm seeing it has 142,000 miles. Is that about right for a vehicle of this age, or has it seen more highway use than expected?

text: That's good to hear. I'm seeing it has 142,000 miles. Is that about right for a vehicle of this age, or has it seen more highway use than expected?

speaker: seller

args.message: 142,000 miles, yep! That's actually pretty darn good for a 2016, tells you it's been mostly highway miles – smooth sailing all the way. These 5.3L V8s just love the open road, and this one's no exception. She's just getting warmed up, believe me! Saw one just like it, same mileage, go for $26,000 at auction last week.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I appreciate you sharing that. While I like what I'm hearing, the asking price of $24,900 is a bit high for me, especially with that mileage. How about we start at $21,500?

text: I appreciate you sharing that. While I like what I'm hearing, the asking price of $24,900 is a bit high for me, especially with that mileage. How about we start at $21,500?

speaker: seller

args.message: $21,500? Hmm, I hear you, but that's a bit lower than I was expecting for such a clean, well-maintained Tahoe. I can do $23,500. That's a fantastic price for this model and condition, especially considering the luxury features and the powerful V8 engine. It's a steal at that price, honestly.

text: $21,500? Hmm, I hear you, but that's a bit lower than I was expecting for such a clean, well-maintained Tahoe. I can do $23,500. That's a fantastic price for this model and condition, especially considering the luxury features and the powerful V8 engine. It's a steal at that price, honestly.

speaker: buyer

args.message: I understand wanting to get top dollar, but $23,500 is still quite a bit over my budget. I can stretch to $22,000, but that's my absolute limit. Can you meet me there?

text: I understand wanting to get top dollar, but $23,500 is still quite a bit over my budget. I can stretch to $22,000, but that's my absolute limit. Can you meet me there?

speaker: seller

args.message: $22,000, you say? Look, I really want to make this work for you, and I know you'll love this Tahoe. It's a solid vehicle. Tell you what, I'll come down to $22,800. That's the best I can do. It’s a really fair deal for a family SUV in this condition.
